ACCOUNTS_SUPPORTED_SIGN_IN: {svc} - {count} accounts. Supported sign-in methods: {how} You can add as many as you like.
ADMIN_ACTIVE_SUSPENDED_AWAITING: 🛡️ admin · 🟢 active · ⏸️ suspended · 🕓 awaiting first start
ALL_SERVICES_EXCEPT_THE: All services except the ones checked ✅ below.
AN_ERROR_OCCURRED_IT: ⚠️ An error occurred. It was sent for review - try again in a moment.
AN_ERROR_OCCURRED_IT_2: ⚠️ An error occurred. It was reported for review - try again in a moment.
AUTO_MONITOR_NEW_EPISODES: 🔔 Auto-monitor ({count}) New episodes in a series/podcast will be downloaded and sent to you automatically (checked every ~30 min).
BROADCAST_MESSAGE_BROADCAST_TO: 📢 Broadcast a message Broadcast to whom? (the message is copied as-is, without credit)
CATALOG_LOADED_TITLES_LOADING: 🟢 Catalog loaded: {n} titles. Loading the list...
CDM_FILES_WIDEVINE_PLAYREADY: 🔑 CDM files (Widevine / PlayReady) {count} files. {note} Used to download from DRM services. You can have several (.wvd / .prd).
COULD_NOT_DETECT_SERVICE: Could not detect a service from this link.
COULD_NOT_DETECT_SERVICE_2: Could not detect a service from this link. Try another link, or pick a service from the menu.
COULD_NOT_PARSE_THAT: Could not parse that. Examples: 30m · 2h · 4d3h · 90s · 6-7h (random range). Min 30 seconds.
COULD_NOT_SAVE_IT: Could not save it, continuing without.
CURRENT_TAB_YOU_CAN: Current tab: {cat} - you can move it:
DONE_BUT_NO_FILE: Done, but no file was found (maybe there was no content for the selected type).
ERROR_READING_THE_CATALOG: 🔴 Could not read that catalog file.
EXISTING_EPISODES_MARK_WHAT: {name} {count} existing episodes. Mark what to download in each episode:
FILTERS_STACK_ALL_MUST: Filters stack (all must match). Categories: none checked = all. A blocked service simply will not appear to the user.
FIXED_THUMBNAIL_FOR_ALL: {name} Fixed thumbnail for all the monitor's episodes? (optional)
FIXED_THUMBNAIL_FOR_THE: Fixed thumbnail for the monitor (an image used as the thumbnail for every episode):
FROM_WHICH_EPISODE_TO: {name} From which episode to start downloading?
HOW_OFTEN_TO_SCAN: {name} How often to scan for new episodes?
HOW_OFTEN_TO_SCAN_2: How often to scan? Examples: 30m · 2h · 4d3h · 90s · 6-7h (random range):
HOW_OFTEN_TO_SCAN_3: How often to scan? Examples: 30m · 2h · 4d3h · 6-7h (random range):
MARK_WHAT_TO_DOWNLOAD_2: Mark what to download in each new episode:
MONITOR_ADDED_FOR_EVERY: 🔔 Monitor added for {name} (every {iv}). New episodes will be sent automatically.
MY_ACCOUNTS_SERVICES_THAT: My accounts Services that require sign-in - pick one to add/manage your accounts (you can have several per service):
NO_CONTENT_FOUND_AT: No content found at this link.
NO_EPISODES_FOUND_MONITORING: No episodes found - monitoring works on series/podcasts.
NO_MATCHING_CONTENT_WAS: 🔍 No matching content was found at this link.
NO_MESSAGE_TO_BROADCAST: No message to broadcast. Reply to a message with 'broadcast'.
NO_SEARCHABLE_SERVICES_HERE: No searchable services here. Try another tab.
NO_SUBTITLES_FOUND_FOR: No subtitles found for this title.
NO_TITLES_DETECTED_IN: 🔴 No titles detected in the file (missing manifest_url/keys?).
PICK_THE_FIRST_EPISODE: Pick the first episode to download (it and onward):
SEASONS_EPISODES_TOTAL_PICK:
{seasons} seasons · {episodes} episodes total

Pick a season:
SEND_AN_IMAGE_AS: 🖼️ Send an image as a fixed thumbnail
SEND_CDM_FILE_NOW: Send a CDM file now as a document: • .wvd = Widevine • .prd = PlayReady (sometimes HD where Widevine is limited)
SEND_PHOTO_NOW_AS: Send a photo now (as a Photo) to use as the thumbnail for every episode:
SEND_PHOTO_NOW_AS_2: Send a photo now (as a Photo) to use as the thumbnail:
SEND_THE_COOKIES_TXT: Send the cookies.txt file now for {svc} (as a file/document):
SEND_URL_OF_SERIES: Send a URL of a series/podcast to monitor (new episodes will be sent automatically):
SEND_USERNAME_AND_PASSWORD: Send a username and password now for {svc} in the format: user:pass (stored encrypted. You can also use user password)
SERVICE_NOW_SEND_LINK: Service: {service} Now send a link (or ID) of what you'd like to download:
SUBTITLES_THAT_WEREN_AVAILABLE: Subtitles that weren't available right now:
SWITCHING_TO_DOWNLOAD_VIA: Switching to download via the proxy...
TEMPORARY_NETWORK_ISSUE_TRY: 📡 Temporary network issue - try again in a moment.
THE_SERVICE_IS_BUSY: ⏳ The service is busy right now - try again in a few minutes.
THE_USER_HID_THEIR: 🔴 The user hid their account in forwards. Add by ID or @username.
THIS_CONTENT_IS_BLOCKED: 🌍 This content is blocked in our region (geo-locked). We're on it.
THIS_CONTENT_IS_PROTECTED: 🔒 This content is protected (DRM) and needs a CDM file. Add a .wvd/.prd in 🔑 CDM Files.
THIS_FILE_REQUIRES_PREMIUM: 📦 This file requires a Premium account.
THIS_SERVICE_REQUIRES_CDM: 🔒 This service requires a CDM (Widevine) and you don't have your own file, and you don't have permission for the shared CDM. Add a .wvd file in '🔐 My accounts → 🔑 CDM files'.
THIS_SERVICE_REQUIRES_LOGIN: 🔐 This service requires login. Add an account/cookies in 🔐 My Accounts and try again.
TO_ADD_USER_SEND: To add a user, send one of these: • numeric ID • @username • forward a message from the user (I'll grab the ID automatically)
TYPE_LANGUAGE_CODE_TO: Type a language code to translate to (for example ko, th, hi, pl):
TYPE_SERIES_MOVIE_NAME: 📝 Type a series/movie name to pull subtitles from
UNEXPECTED_ERROR_DURING_DOWNLOAD: Unexpected error during download/upload. The admin has been notified.
USERS_PICK_USER_TO: 👥 Users ({count}) {legend} Pick a user to manage:
WELCOME_WHAT_WOULD_YOU: Welcome{name} 👋 What would you like to do?
WHICH_CDM_FILE_SHOULD: Which CDM file should I use?
WILL_BE_ACTIVATED_AUTOMATICALLY: (will be activated automatically when they first open the bot)
YOU_DON_HAVE_ACCESS: You don't have access to the shared CDM - DRM downloads need your own .wvd file.
YOU_DON_HAVE_ACCESS_2: You don't have access to this service.
YOU_DON_HAVE_PERMISSION: 🚫 You don't have permission for this service.
YOU_DON_HAVE_PERMISSION_2: 🚫 You don't have permission for service {service}.
YOU_DON_HAVE_PERMISSION_3: 🚫 You don't have permission for auto-monitoring.
YOU_DON_HAVE_PERMISSION_4: 🚫 You don't have permission for the {service} service.
YOU_HAVE_SHARED_DEFAULT: You have a shared (default) CDM from the admin.
YOU_RE_ALREADY_DOWNLOADING: You're already downloading {limit} items at once (your maximum). Wait for them to finish or cancel one in 📥 My downloads.
CONTENT_NOT_IN_YOUR_PLAN: 🚫 This title isn't available on your account - it's not included in your subscription/package.
REC_TITLE: 📹 Live recording Pick a channel, or add one:
REC_PAUSED: Paused (live content during the pause is skipped). Resume to keep recording.
REC_FAILED: Recording failed. The admin has been notified.
REC_LINK_EXPIRES: The link expires in a few hours.
REC_ADD_NAME: Send a name for the channel:
REC_ADD_KEY: Send the CENC key if the channel is encrypted (KID:KEY or just the key), or tap Skip:
REC_NEW_URL: Send the new live manifest URL:
REC_NEW_KEY: Send the new CENC key (KID:KEY or just the key), or tap Skip to clear it:
REC_NO_SPACE: Not enough disk space for this recording (need ~{need}, free {free}). Try a shorter duration.
SEND_DEFAULT_COOKIES: Send a cookies.txt to use as the shared default for {svc} (used when a user has none of their own):
GOFILE_SETTING_EXPLAIN: Attach a public gofile download link to your downloads?
ASK_GOFILE: Also upload to a gofile download link?
GOFILE_SEND_FILE: Send me a file (any type) and I'll upload it to gofile and give you a public download link.
